subject: Stop your PM from chasing painters
body:
Hi Vikneswaran,

Quick intro — Ashrah Painting, commercial finishing in Winnipeg.

Most painting subs make your PM chase for status. Lumia (our ops layer) auto-sends a daily site report at 5:30 PM AND lets your PM ask 'where are you on [unit]?' anytime — and answers. No more phone tag. Plus 6-day delay forecasting and pro cleaning at handoff.

Worth a 10-minute call?
needs_review_flags: Email guessed at vik@bob-sled.ca — VERIFY (could be vikneswaran@ or v.thirumalai@).
